title: NIAB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Project Research Scientist & Project Technical Support II Posts
description: The National Institute of Animal Biotechnology, Hyderabad (NIAB Hyderabad) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Project Research Scientist I and Project Technical Support II Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, Diploma, DMLT, Post-graduation, and Ph.D. can apply for the NIAB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply...
